articles.author: Katie Livingstone
articles.title: ‘We don’t have infantry’: Ukraine’s war machine evolves into machine war - Defense News
articles.description: Outmanned by a nuclear power in the largest land war in Europe since 1945, Ukraine’s front line is increasingly held by machines.
articles.content:
KYIV, Ukraine The army that stopped Russias march on Kyiv four years ago no longer exists.
Outmanned and outgunned by a nuclear power in the largest land war in Europe since 1945, Ukraines front lin… [+9378 chars]
